description: Jarvis built new IES capabilities directly — new workflow steps (step-auto.md), vault conventions files, scheduled-tasks.json, and modifications to morning-briefing, daily-review, and quinn-weekly-review — without involving Rigby or routing through the capability-build workflow. Changes were not tracked for evolution packaging.
correction: All new capability builds (new files, workflow modifications, skill updates, config creation) must route through Rigby's capability-build workflow so changes are tracked, follow system conventions, and are packageable as evolutions.
systemic_fix: Same fix as err-20260321-003 — which was logged as 'proposed' but clearly not applied. Rigby must be invoked for any capability build. Jarvis coordinates; Rigby executes and tracks system changes.
